name: Live from Space
overview: Being an astronaut is the most dangerous and extraordinary job there is. But what's life really like in microgravity? This March, Channel 4 will boldly go to space with a groundbreaking new season, Live from Space. We'll meet the astronauts on-board the International Space Station, visit NASA and see Earth from Space.

trailers.title: Live from Space Season | Starts Wednesday 12th March | Channel 4
